citation_label: 2026 Declaration of Estimated Tax for Individuals — General Information and Instructions
heading: 2026 Declaration of Estimated Tax for Individuals — General Information and Instructions

metadata.source_note: Official tax-year-2026 IT-540ESi estimated-tax instructions and worksheet. Page 2 publishes Louisiana estimated standard deductions of $12,875 for single and married-filing-separately filers and $25,750 for married-filing-jointly, head-of-household, and qualifying surviving spouse filers. The worksheet subtracts estimated exempt income and the filing-status deduction from estimated federal adjusted gross income, then multiplies estimated Louisiana taxable income by 3%. It directs taxpayers to use the 2025 Form IT-540 and instructions as a guide and refers to estimated 2025 credits without supplying their rules. This source supports the 2026 estimated-tax worksheet only and does not certify a complete final tax-year-2026 resident return.
metadata.title: 2026 Declaration of Estimated Tax for Individuals — General Information and Instructions
metadata.worksheet_adjusted_income_tax_formula: Subtract estimated 2025 total nonrefundable credits and estimated 2025 total refundable credits from estimated Louisiana income tax.
metadata.worksheet_income_tax_formula: Multiply estimated Louisiana taxable income by 3 percent.
metadata.worksheet_taxable_income_formula: Subtract estimated exempt income and the Louisiana estimated standard deduction from estimated federal adjusted gross income.

Declaration of Estimated Tax for Individuals General Information and Instructions https://latap.revenue.louisiana.gov

This document explains the requirements for certain individuals Exception to the January 15th Declaration Requirement to pay estimated income tax on taxable income that is not subject Louisiana Revised Statute 47:116(F) provides an exception from to withholding, such as income from self-employment, interest, the estimated tax payment amendment requirement or original dividends, rents, and other taxable income such as unemployment declaration requirement due January 15th if the taxpayer files compensation that the individual do not choose to make voluntary their individual income tax return by January 31 and pays the total withholding payments. If a couple Estimated tax payments can be paid by check or money order files a joint declaration, but they file their income taxes separately, to the Department of Revenue and mailed with Form IT-540ES, the estimated tax paid may be treated as the estimated tax of Louisiana Estimated Tax Declaration Voucher. The payment must either spouse or may be divided between them in any manner. be postmarked on or before the payment’s due date. The payment and voucher should be mailed to the Department of Revenue, P.O. Special Rules for Farmers and Fishermen Box 91007, Baton Rouge, Louisiana 70821-9007. Louisiana Revised Statute 47:116(B) provides that individuals who earn at least two-thirds of their gross income from farming or Pay Electronically fishing are allowed to file only one estimated tax payment of the Paying electronically ensures timely receipt of payments. Changes in Income or Exemptions — Amended Declarations If the taxpayer’s expected income or exemptions change so that the taxpayer becomes liable for paying estimated income tax or the estimated income tax amount changes, the estimated tax payments should be calculated or revised using the appropriate worksheet and the payments adjusted as of the next estimated payment due date.

You can pay your Louisiana Estimated Tax for Individuals by Credit Card, over the Internet, or by phone. Visit www.revenue.louisiana.gov for more information.

IT-540ESi (2026) Worksheet for Estimating Your 2026 Louisiana Individual Income Tax Keep for your records. Do not mail. Form IT-540 and instructions for 2025 should be used as a guide.

1. Estimated Federal Adjusted Gross Income for 2026 1. 00

2. Estimated Exempt Income for 2025 2. 00

3. Enter on Line 3 the Louisiana If your filing status is: estimated standard deduction. Single $12,875 Married Filing Joint $25,750 3. 00 Married Filing Separate $12,875

Head of Household $25,750

Qualifying Survivng Spouse $25,750

4. Your Estimated Louisiana Taxable Income (Subtract Lines 2 and 3 from Line 1.) 4. 00

5. Estimated Louisiana Income Tax (Multiply Line 4 by .03.) 5. 00

6. Less Estimated 2025 Total Nonrefundable Credits 6. 00

7. Less Estimated 2025 Total Refundable Credits 7. 00

8. Adjusted Louisiana Income Tax (Subtract Lines 6 and 7 from Line 5.) 8. 00

Less Louisiana Income Tax to Be Withheld in 2026 Including Any 9. 9. 00 Credit Carried Forward from 2025 (Round to the nearest dollar.)

10. Estimated Income Tax (Subtract Line 9 from Line 8.) 10. 00

11. If you first become liable to Then enter on Line 11 and in “Amount of file a declaration on or before: Payment” block on Form IT-540ES: April 15, 2026 1/4 of Line 10 (Make 4 installments) June 15, 2026 1/3 of Line 10 (Make 3 installments) 11. 00

September 15, 2026 1/2 of Line 10 (Make 2 installments)

January 15, 2027 Line 10 must be paid in full

Note: If your estimated tax should change during the year, you may use the amended computation below to determine the amended amount to be entered on the declaration voucher.

Amended Computation Use if estimated tax is substantially changed after the first declaration voucher is filed.

1. Amended Estimated Tax 1. 00

2. Less: A. Amount of last year’s overpayment carried forward to 2026 estimated tax and applied to date 2A. 00

B. Amount of estimated payments made for 2026 2B. 00

C. Total of Lines 2A and 2B 2C. 00

3. Unpaid Balance (Line 1 less Line 2C) 3. 00

Amount to be paid (Line 3 divided by number of remaining installments) 4. 4. 00 Enter here and in “Amount of Payment” block on declaration voucher, Form IT-540ES

How to Use the Declaration Voucher

1. Fill out the worksheet above to calculate your estimated tax for 2026. 4. Detach the voucher at the perforation and attach check or money order. You may use your 2025 Form IT-540 and its instructions as a guide. Fill in the Record of Estimated Tax Payments schedule at the bottom of this page. If you prepared a 2025 return on Form IT-540 or Form IT-540B and expect your income in 2026 to be the same as it was for 2025, you may 5. Address changes can be submitted by accessing your account at https://latap.revenue.louisiana.gov. c. Detach at the perforation and mail with the required payment.
